snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

snippet.title: ŗīēŗĶáŗīįŗī≥ŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīĺŗī≥ŗĶÜ ŗīģŗĶĀŗī§ŗĶĹ ŗīēŗĶľŗīęŗĶćŗīĮŗĶā.ŗī≤ŗĶčŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶćŗī°ŗĶóŗĶļ ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĖŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī™ŗī®ŗīā ŗīą ŗīįŗĶÄŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮŗīŅŗĶĹ.ŗī™ŗīįŗĶÄŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗīēŗĶĺ ŗīáŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī®ŗĶÜ|Kerala News Update.Kerala
snippet.description:
Video deals with Central and state government up-to-date announcements.
Indian Government, at all levels, announces Welfare Schemes for a cross section of the society from time to time. These schemes could be either Central, State specific or a joint collaboration between the Centre and the States. In this section, we have attempted to provide you an easy and single point access to information about several welfare schemes of the Government and their various aspects including eligible beneficiaries, types of benefits, scheme details etc.
‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē‚≠ē

‚ö†ÔłŹ ŗīą ŗīöŗīĺŗī®ŗī≤ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜ ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīłŗīŅŗī¶ŗĶćŗīßŗĶÄŗīēŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī°ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶčŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀŗī§ŗīįŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīģŗĶĀŗī≥ŗĶćŗī≥ ŗīįŗīĺŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīĮŗīā/ ŗīģŗī§ŗīā ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīŅŗīĶŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīÖŗī§ŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīłŗīįŗīā ŗīáŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗīóŗīĶŗĶļŗīģŗĶÜŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗī™ŗĶčŗī≥ŗīŅŗīłŗīŅŗīēŗĶĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīéŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīĶŗĶáŗī£ŗīģŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīģŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīā ŗīČŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗīĺŗīĶŗīĺŗīā. ŗīÖŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗīĺŗĶĹ ŗī™ŗĶĀŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮ ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī°ŗīŅŗīĮŗĶč ŗīÖŗī™ŗĶć‚ÄĆŗī°ŗĶáŗī∑ŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗī∂ŗĶćŗīįŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗīē.

Roop Maatu Ko Adhik Suhave
Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Paave
Tum Sansar Shakti Ley Keena
Palan Hetu Anna Dhan Deena
Annapoorna Hui Jag Paala
Tumhi Aadi Sundari Bala

Pralayakal Sab Nashaan Haari
Tum Gouri Shiv Shankar Pyari
Shiv Yogi Tumhare Gun Gaavein
Brahma Vishnu Tumhein Nit Dhyaave
Roop Saraswati Ko Tum Dhara
De Subuddhi Rishi Munina Ubara
Dhara Roop Narsimha Ko Amba
Pragat Bhayi Phaad Kar Khamba

Raksha Kari Prahlad Bachayo
Hiranyaykush Ko Swarg Pathayo
Lakshmi Roop Dharo Jag Mahin
Shree Narayan Anga Samahin

Ksheer Sindhu Mein Karat Vilaasa
Daya Sindhu Deejey Mann Aasa
Hingalaja Mein Tumhi Bhawani
Mahima Amit Na Jaat Bakhani

Matangi Dhoomawati Mata
Bhuvaneshwari Bagala Sukhdata
Shree Bhairav Tara Jag Tarini
Chhinna Bhala Bhava Dukh Nivarini
Kehari Vahan Sohe Bhawani
Laangur Veer Chalat Agavani
Kar Mein Khappar Khadaga Virajay
Jako Dekh Kaal Darr Bhajey

Sohe Astra Aur Trishula
Jate Uthata Shatru Hiya Shoola

Nagkoti Mein Toumhi Virajat
Tihoun Lok Mein Danka Baajat
Shumbh Nishumbh Daanav Tum Maare
Rakta Beej Shankhana Sanghaare
Mahishasur Nrip Ati Abhimani
Jehi Agh Bhar Mahi Akulaani

Roop Karaal Kali Ka Dhara
Sena Sahita Tum Tihin Samhara
 Padi Peed Santan Par Jab Jab
Bhayi Sahay Maat Tum Tab Tab
Amarpuri Auro Sab Lokaa
Tab Mahima Sab Rahey Ashoka
Jwala Mein Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tumhein Sada Poojey Nar Nari

Prem Bhakti Se Jo Jas Gaave
Dukh Daridra Nikat Nahin Aave
Dhyave Jo Nar Mann Layi
Janma Maran Tako Chhouti Jaayi
Jogi Sur Muni Kahat Pukaari
Yog Nahi Bina Shakti Tumhari
Shankar Acharaj Tap Kinho
Kaamaru Krodh Jeet Sab Leenho

Nishdin Dhyan Dharo Shankar Ko
Kaahu Kaal Nahin Sumiro Tumko
Shakti Roop Ko Maram Na Paayo
Shakti Gayi Tab Mann Pachitayo
Sharnagat Huyi Kiriti Bakhai
Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe Bhawani

Bhayi Prasanna Aadi Jagadamba
Dayi Shakti Nahin Keen Vilamba

Maukon Maatu Kashta Ati Ghero
Tum Bin Kaun Hare Dukh Mero
Asha Trishna Nipat Satave
Ripu Murakh Mohi Ati Darpave
Shatru Nash Keeje Maharani
Sumiron Ikchit Tumhein Bhawani
Karo Kripa Hey Maatu Dayala
Riddhi Siddhi Dey Karahou Nihaala

Jab Lagi Jiyoun Daya Phal Paun
Tumharo Jas Mein Sada Sunaun
Durga Chalisa Jo Koi Gaavey
Sab Sukh Bhog Parampad Paave

Devidas Sharan Neej Jaani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani

Sharanagat Raksha Kare
Bhakt Rahe Nishank
Me Aaya Teri Sharan Mein
Matu Leejiye Ank

en.title: Covid: Lockdown Likely In Country
en.description: New Delhi: The Centre has not ruled out the possibility of a lockdown in the country in the wake of Covid-19 second wave. Home Minister Amit Shah has said that the decision to announce the lockdown will be taken in consultation with the chief ministers.

Music Studio Haryanvi Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sawaal ŗ§łŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§≤ ( Official Video ). Another superhit haryanvi song sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Ravi Panchal , Priya Soni & Shivashdeep Jangid. Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Aamin Barodi. The video is directed by Jeetu G.Music Label & Copyrights by Music Studio Haryanvi.

snippet.title: Grand Iftar Feast with Newborn / Ramadan Vlog 2021 / Zulfia's Recipes / Tamil Vlog
snippet.description:
#ramadan2021 #iftar2021 #zulfiasrecipes

Ramadan Kareem! 
 May you and your family find happiness and joy in Ramadan 2021!

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. Don‚Äôt miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: What Did Vivek Do? | Tamil | Actor Vivek Untold Story | Madan Gowri | MG
snippet.description:
Join Special MG Squad: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY6KjrDBN_tIRFT_QNqQbRQ/join
--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing Tamil Comedy Actor Dr. PadmaShree Vivek. His achievements, his story, his motivation, his relationship with Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, and last but not the least, his pet project of planting 1 crore trees in India. This will be a celebration of Actor Vivek.

snippet.title: ŗīēŗĶčŗīĶŗīŅŗī°ŗĶć ŗīįŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗīĺŗīā ŗī§ŗīįŗīāŗīóŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗĶĹ 4 ŗī™ŗĶĀŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮŗī§ŗīįŗīā ŗīįŗĶčŗīóŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ. ŗīéŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺŗīĶŗīįŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗīĪŗīŅŗīěŗĶćŗīěŗīŅŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶáŗī£ŗĶćŗīü ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīßŗīĺŗī®ŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗīüŗĶćŗīü ŗīáŗĶĽŗīęŗĶľŗīģŗĶáŗī∑ŗĶĽ
snippet.description:
ŗīēŗĶčŗīĶŗīŅŗī°ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶÜ ŗīÜŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮŗī§ŗīįŗīāŗīóŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§  ŗīöŗīŅŗī≤ ŗī™ŗĶĀŗī§ŗīŅŗīĮ ŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ.. 
0:00 Start
3:25 ŗīēŗĶáŗīįŗī≥ŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶć‚Äć ŗīóŗĶĀŗīįŗĶĀŗī§ŗīįŗīā ŗīÜŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗĶć ŗīéŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī®ŗĶÜ?
5:00 ŗīíŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīĺŗīģŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜ ŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīā?
6:03 ŗīįŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗīĺŗīģŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜ-ŗīģŗĶāŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīĺŗīģŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜ ŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīā?
6:50 ŗī®ŗī≤ŗīĺŗīģŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶÜ ŗī≤ŗīēŗĶćŗī∑ŗī£ŗīā?
9:00 ŗī¨ŗīĺŗīßŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗīĺŗī≤ŗĶć‚Äć ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀ ŗīłŗīāŗī≠ŗīĶŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗīā
10:00 ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀ ŗīģŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶć‚Äć ŗīēŗīįŗĶĀŗī§ŗī≤ŗĶć‚Äć ŗīéŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗī£ŗīā?

KANNANA KANNE is a family drama serial on Sun TV. snippet.description:

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn‚Äôt have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here‚Äôs to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha‚Äôs father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

en.description:
Though Gaurav is all excited for his first drink with Reva, destiny has other plans in store for him. How does he end up drinking with his friends and what chaos leads to them landing in big trouble? Find out in this episode! The fun has just begun...
Jhoom is our new web series that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday.Subscribe to BhaDiPa to get alerts on our new videos! ŗ§∂ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§į ŗ§Öŗ§łŗ§§ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•á !

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 17 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara‚Äôs birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can‚Äôt tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Will CSK Roar Again? Matchday Live With Cheeka | CSK VS RR IPL 2021| Match 12
snippet.description:
The first week of IPl 14 just got over with the doubleheader and it's time for week 2 of ipl 14 to begin.

Chennai super kings take on the Rajasthan Royals for their 1st game against each other. Both the teams are coming into the game with confidence after their respective victories against Punjab kings and the Delhi capitals.

Who will win it this time around? Can Rajasthan Royals led by the young and dynamic Sanju Samson get 2 points or the veteran of the IPL Ms dhoni lead his time once again to beat the
Rajasthan Royals?

Join us Live at 12 pm on another exciting live stream on the ipl along with Kris Srikkanth and Anirudha Srikkanth in a live series throughout the duration of the IPL!

Matchday live with cheeka is a show one of its kind and we want you to join in the conversation.

snippet.title: Want Stable Mental Health? Take Charge Of Your Feelings | Gaur Gopal Das
snippet.description: Have any of you ever felt upset because someone said something unpleasant or did something wrong to you? Have any of you felt helpless, frustrated and even angry in your dealings with someone? Has your mind ever become disturbed because of someone‚Äôs inappropriate behaviour? And no matter what, people don‚Äôt even change. And we continue to remain perpetual victims. How can one come out of such a predicament? How can one deal with such situations and maintain stable mental health ? Take a look!

snippet.title: Mutual Funds Complete Details By Arun Surya Teja
snippet.description:
Angel Broking Demat Account(Free) - https://tinyurl.com/yg4fvayv
For support, WhatsApp 8688962057

A mutual fund is a professionally managed investment fund that pools money from many investors to purchase securities. These investors may be retail or institutional in nature.

Mutual funds have advantages and disadvantages compared to direct investing in individual securities. The primary advantages of mutual funds are that they provide economies of scale, a higher level of diversification, they provide liquidity, and they are managed by professional investors. On the negative side, investors in a mutual fund must pay various fees and expenses.

ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§¶ ŗ§ēŗ•ąŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§ā ? ŗ§úŗ§¨ ŗ§Įŗ•á ŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§āŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ§§ŗ§ĺŗ§Įŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§łŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§™ ŗ§§ŗ•čŗ§≤ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§• ŗ§Įŗ•á ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§ü ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§¶ ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§ā |Halwa-Chana

#AshtmiPrasad#HalwaChana#NirmlaNehra

Ingredients:-

For Halwa:-
Semolina-1 cup
Sugar-1 cup
Water-3 cup
Ghee-1/2 cup
Cardamom Powder-1/2 tsp

For Chana:-
Soaked Black Chickpeas-3 cup
Ginger-1 inch
Oil/Ghee-3-4 tbsp
Coriander Powder-2 tsp
Dry Mango Powder-1 tsp
Turmeric Powder-1/4 tsp
Red Chilli Powder-1 tsp
Kasuri Methi-1 tsp
Chana Masala-1 tsp
Black Pepper Powder-1 tsp
Cumin Seeds-1 tsp
Bay Leaf-1
Asafoetida-a pinch 
Salt -to taste
Coriander Leaves

snippet.title: ŗ§™ŗ§®ŗ•Äŗ§į ŗ§üŗ§Ņŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§ģŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§ßŗ§Ņ - paneer tikka masala restaurant style recipe -cookingshooking
snippet.description:
Dosto Paneer Tikka Masala ki recipe le kar aaya hu, ye tried and tested recipe hai secret ingredient ke saath, bilkul restaurant style me banti hai :)

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients:
Paneer Tikka Masala

Tikka ke lie:
Mustard Oil - 2 tbsp
Besan - 2 tbsp
Kashmiri Red Chili Powder - ¬Ĺ tbsp

Jeera Powder - ¬Ĺ tsp
Garam Masala - ¬Ĺ tsp
Kali Mirch - ¬Ĺ tsp
Chat Masala - 1 tsp
Salt - to taste
Kasoori Methi - ¬Ĺ tsp
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Dahi - 4 tbsp

Lemon - 1, juiced
Shimla Mirch - 7-8 pieces ( green & yellow)
Pyaaz - 1 shelled
Paneer - 200g

Water - to adjust consistency
Charcoal - 1 
Oil - ¬Ĺ tsp

For Gravy 
Oil - 2 tbsp
Pyaaz - 1 cup chopped
Salt - to taste
GG Paste - 1 tsp
Tomato - 1 cup chopped

Oil - 2 tbsp
Kali Elaichi - 3 
Kali Mirch - ¬Ĺ tsp
Dhania Powder - 1 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - ¬Ĺ tsp (can add color if not using kashmiri chili)
Hari Mirch - 3 slit
Hara Dhania Leaves - 2-3 tbsp
Leftover Marinate of the Tikka
Corn Starch - 1 tsp (dissolve with 2 tbsp water)
Sugar - ¬Ĺ tsp
Cream - 2 tbsp


Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: Gokuldham ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§≤ŗ§°ŗ§ľŗ§ĺŗ§ą ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ćŗ§≤ | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Gun Warga - Harvy Sandhu (Official Video) | Gurlez Akhtar | Desi Crew | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
New Punjabi Song 2021 - Gun Warga
Listen to on all audio streaming platforms: https://harvysandhu.bfan.link/gun-warga.yde

The quintessential Punjabi machismo shines in Harvy Sandhu's latest track  'Gun Warga'. Featuring music by the famous Desi Crew and featuring vocals by the amazing Gurlez Akhtar, the track will surely make you jump with energy. 

Track credits:
Song: Gun Warga
Singer: Harvy Sandhu
Music: Desi Crew
Lyrics: Jeet Kamal Kuhliwala
Video: Tru Team
Mix & Master: Sameer Charegoankar
Female Lead: Isha Sharma
Dop: Shoeb Siddiqui
Edit & DI: Garry Khatrao Media
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Photography: Harnam Singh
Special Thanks: Sanjeev Sharma
Hair - Ravi
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer - Robin Singh
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Akshay Kapoor

Reels Promotion - Blue Apple Digital
Online Promotions - GK Digital

Follow me on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnFacebook
Instagram: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnInstagram
Twitter: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnTwitter
Snapchat: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnSnapchat

Don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube Channel:
https://bit.ly/HarvyOnYouTube

For Licensing enquiries:

#HarvySandhu #GurlezAkhtar #GunWarga

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

For booking enquiries:
artistbooking-india@believedigital.com


Lyrics :- 
Jione mod jiha rakhda si roab jo
vairiyan de mna vich ni
jet sky kehnda taarni aa hun kude
pyar wali jhana vich ni
heera raani de taaj vich jadya 
ni kehnda tere tann warga
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

peen jatti diya sonha utte chobar 
ve gla vicho zaan sukkiyan 
suit hunde ne import ve lahore ton
te saudi walon aun juttiyan
jinne listan ch aunde ne greek god
lainde ne dream saak de
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

teri gallan diyan gallan rahe karda
jado khull jande datt ni
jehra khara vi na paave laal pari ch
oh laaliyan ne liya patt ni
kehnda nattiyan pva lu oh ch tere layi
si baapu jehra kann fadd da....
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

kala mole ve jatti di gori gall te
nazran ton raakhi karda
kaale rang da paranda bacha naag da
ve zehar wangu jaave charhda
jeet kuhliwale utte ho gaye parche
nitt hunde ne khadaak ve.....
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

saah lain vi ni dinda ea bullet nu 
ni gedi utte gedi rakhda
kitte chakkya na jaave putt jatt da
ni billo tera time chakkda
teri takkni kaleja billo thaar ta
jo tappda si sun warga,
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

snippet.title: Shakti | ŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§Ņ | Episode 1222 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Soumya's encounter with the man claiming to be Harman is interrupted when she gets a distressing call from Heer. Catch what happens next in this sneak peek from the coming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: How India lost its way with Covid-19, as Modi govt walks into a crisis so bad it could unravel it
snippet.description:
#NationalInterest  #Covid #IndiaCovid19
The crisis with the return of Covid, already twice as bad as the peak in the first wave and worsening still, has the potential of unravelling the Modi government.
Shekhar Gupta explains in #NationalInterest

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 ‚Äď Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚ÄĚ Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel‚Äôs Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he‚Äôs going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they‚Äôve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom‚Äôs forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe‚ÄĒfrom London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚ÄĚ Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar¬ģ winner Helen Mirren and Oscar¬ģ winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom‚Äôs past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§óŗ§£ŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§•ŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§≤ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§Źŗ§ē ŗ§Öŗ§āŗ§ß ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§∂ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ§āŗ§ßŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§≥ŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ§Ļ ŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ§§ ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ŗ•Ä. ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ•Ä, ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§°ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§óŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§§ŗ•čŗ§≤ ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§äŗ§® ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§įŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§°ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ. ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ł ŗ§üŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§® ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§ėŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ•áŗ§ēŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ö ŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§•ŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ŗ•Ä. ŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§įŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§°ŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ā ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ā. ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ł ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§łŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§āŗ§¨ ŗ§® ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ŗ§≤ŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ŗ§≤ŗ§ā. ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§ėŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ•áŗ§ēŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§®ŗ§öŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§£ ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§≤ŗ•á.¬†

ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§™ŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺ ŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ§įŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§óŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§® ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§łŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ ŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§£ ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•á. ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ėŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§āŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•Ćŗ§§ŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ ŗ§Üŗ§Ļŗ•á.

ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§óŗ§£ŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§•ŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§≤ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§Źŗ§ē ŗ§Öŗ§āŗ§ß ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§∂ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ§āŗ§ßŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§≥ŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ§Ļ ŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ§§ ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ŗ•Ä. ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ•Ä, ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§°ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§óŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§§ŗ•čŗ§≤ ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§äŗ§® ŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§įŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§°ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ. ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ł ŗ§üŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§® ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§ėŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ•áŗ§ēŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ö ŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§•ŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ŗ•Ä. ŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ•á ŗ§įŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§°ŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ā ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ā. ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ł ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•čŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§łŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§āŗ§¨ ŗ§® ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ŗ§≤ŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Öŗ§üŗ§ęŗ•Čŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ŗ§≤ŗ§ā. ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§ėŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ•áŗ§ēŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≤ŗ§óŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§£ŗ§Ņ ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§®ŗ§öŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§£ ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§≤ŗ•á.¬†

ŗ§™ŗ•Čŗ§ąŗ§āŗ§üŗ§ģŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§≥ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§™ŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•Ä ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺ ŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ§įŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§óŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§® ŗ§Źŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§łŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§ėŗ•áŗ§§ ŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§£ ŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•á. ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§®ŗ•Ä ŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ėŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§āŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§≥ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•Ćŗ§§ŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķ ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§§ ŗ§Üŗ§Ļŗ•á.

Watch the Promo of the Popular Malayalam Show #SwanthamSujatha that airs on Surya TV.
 
Watch this serial exclusively on Surya TV.
Tune in at 9:00 PM (Mon to Fri)
Repeat Telecast at 8:00 AM and 1:30 PM (Mon to Fri)
 
 #SwanthamSujatha #SwanthamSujathaPromo #SuryaTV
 
 Swantham Sujatha revolves around Sujatha, a happy home maker, who loves her family and cherishes her life. But her life turns into a roller coaster ride, when she finds her true calling as an RJ after being home bound for years. Follow Sujatha's story of self awakening , even as she deals with life's challenges and finds a way around them.
